title: Collaborator
description: Represents a user who has been granted access to an organization or project in Bugsnag.

id.description: The unique identifier of the collaborator.

is_admin.description: Whether the collaborator has administrator privileges.

projects_url.description: The API URL to list projects accessible to this collaborator.

created_at.description: The date and time the collaborator was added.

gravatar_url.description: The Gravatar URL for the collaborator's profile image.

two_factor_enabled.description: Whether the collaborator has two-factor authentication enabled.
